g.text: • Ordered plan by `created_at` (not `id`) to match intuitive FIFO task
sequencing; supports re-ordering in future without breaking this endpoint.
• Filter by `status != 'done'` (not just 'open') to future-proof for new
• No schema migration needed; existing `tasks` table supports all filtering
• No pagination added; "keep it simple" directive takes precedence over
Comments (used as answers to open questions):
